key.waystoneinjector.use_teleport_item: 使用 Waystones 傳送物品
screen.waystoneinjector.config.title: Waystone Button Injector Config
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.butt: Open the per-button settings page for labels, commands, position, and redirect behavior.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.neth: Choose which bundled Nether portal texture variant the client should enable.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.feve: Configure built-in death and sleep redirect rules for automatic server transfers.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.sa: Apply the current values and write them to waystoneinjector-client.toml.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.ba: Return to the previous config screen without forcing a save.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.op: Open the client config file or config folder in your operating system.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.do: Close the config home screen and return to the mods list.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.section.b: Click to expand or collapse the settings for Button %s.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.ena: Turn this custom Waystone menu button on or off.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.lab: Text shown on the button in the Waystones menu. Color codes such as &a and &c are supported.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.com: Command that runs when the button is clicked. Example: redirect @s server.example.com:25565
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.wid: Button width in pixels. Allowed range: 20 to 200.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.hei: Button height in pixels. Allowed range: 15 to 100.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.tex: Hex text color for the button label, such as 0xFFFFFF for white or 0x00FF00 for green.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.sid: Choose where the button should appear in the Waystones menu: auto, left, or right.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.ser: Only show this button when connected to a matching server address. Leave blank to show it everywhere.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.x_o: Horizontal position offset in pixels relative to the default button placement.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.y_o: Vertical position offset in pixels relative to the default button placement.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.dea: Optional redirect mapping used when the client detects a death on the matching server. Format: source->destination
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.sle: Optional redirect mapping used when the client detects sleep on the matching server. Format: source->destination
Chance from 0 to 100 that the sleep redirect should trigger when the player sleeps.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.var: Select the bundled Nether portal resource-pack variant to enable on the client.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.red:
Semicolon-separated Feverdream redirects.
Each entry must start with death: or sleep: and use source->destination.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.dea: How many death detections should occur before a configured Feverdream death redirect is applied.
